contests.title: New: Buy Buzz with Crypto Deposits!
contests.description: Send supported cryptocurrencies directly to your Civitai wallet and have them automatically converted into Buzz! Multiple coins and networks supported! [Read more](https://civitai.com/changelog?id=171)!

metadata.title: New: Buy Buzz with Crypto Deposits!
metadata.content: Send supported cryptocurrencies directly to your Civitai wallet and have them automatically converted into Buzz! Multiple coins and networks supported! [Read more](https://civitai.com/changelog?id=171)!

contests.title: Image/Video Feed Outage - Resolved!
contests.description: Image and video feeds have been fully restored and all previously queued content has now been processed. Uploads and reactions should be functioning normally again. We're still monitoring the affected systems closely! Thank you for your patience while we worked to resolve this issue!

metadata.title: Image/Video Feed Outage - Resolved!
metadata.content: Image and video feeds have been fully restored and all previously queued content has now been processed. Uploads and reactions should be functioning normally again. We're still monitoring the affected systems closely! Thank you for your patience while we worked to resolve this issue!
